description: About the book: Join in on the Christmas fun with Archie, as he learns about all of the amazing Christmas traditions that he will be a part of this year. What a classic Christmas book that explores that all the children's favourite traditions such as gingerbread making, looking at Christmas lights, Christmas carols and so much more! The book itself, is a staple 'first Christmas' tradition - It is a must have for any child's first Christmas! The book is kept as a visual memory, that can be looked back on for years to come! The finer details: 8.5 x 11 inches (Large print, perfect for catching a young child’s attention) The book covers classic Christmas traditions Personalized name throughout the book (Archie/He) Premium, full-color pictures (White pages) Glossy cover The book represents a traditional family, including references to Mother and Father. If you are looking for an inclusive book, please check out our LGBQTI+ range, or our single-family range. Follow the steps in the paragraph below. Personalised Orders: The best way to search for a personalized book in this collection is to type: Cynthia Emanuel + child's name in your Amazon search bar or click on the series link (next to the title) and this should bring up all the other books available - there are over 300 to choose from! You may also choose from generic son/daughter versions. If you are looking for a book in the inclusive range, please type: Cynthia Emanuel + single + Christmas (or) Cynthia Emanuel + LGBTQ + Christmas. Are you looking for a personalized Christmas book, but have not found the name in my Christmas series collection? Simply email the name of the book, and the personalized name you would like to: cynsbookshelf@gmail.com. It will be uploaded to Amazon within 2-3 days, so you can make the purchase. Read more
